claim: End-to-end AI video generation is viable now: research → script → audio synthesis (11Labs/Kokoro) → visual rendering (HyperFrames) → sync & transitions, all orchestrated by Claude Code in a single workflow.
actionable: Use HyperFrames + Claude Code + Archon to auto-generate explainer videos. Pass a topic, get back a finished video ready for review or publishing in minutes.
source_title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: HyperFrames is an HTML-based video editor that Claude Code can programmatically control; prompts include text→speech optimization (natural breaks, abbreviations) and frame-by-frame layout inspection.
actionable: Build video generation workflows with HyperFrames. Have Claude Code generate the HTML composition, inspect layout per frame, sync audio timing, and render to MP4 in one pass.
source_title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: Archon (harness builder) manages parallel workflow execution with durability: every video generation is isolated in its own folder, state is persisted (to Neon DB), and parallel runs are supported.
actionable: Use Archon to wrap long-running workflows. It handles isolation, parallel execution, retries, and state persistence so Claude Code doesn't have to.
source_title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: Templates (JSON playbooks) define video length, content structure, visual style, and scene pacing; agents apply templates to generate on-brand videos without hardcoding style in every prompt.
actionable: Create a template for each video style you want (explainer, announcement, tutorial). Have Claude Code read the template and apply it to different topics automatically.
source_title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)

claim: Preview mode (built into HyperFrames) lets you review and iterate on video composition before rendering expensive MP4; Claude Code can make granular edits (audio inflection, transitions) without re-running the full pipeline.
actionable: Before rendering, always preview the video in HyperFrames. If audio timing or visuals are off, edit inline. Only render MP4 once you're happy with the preview.
source_title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
